reviews.comment:
Si llegas a la madrugada los baños están cerrados, te haces encima.  Esperas que a las 7 am abra el shop y la empleada llega a las 7 15 Hs toda dormida.  Un café con leche pelado 1280 mangos… en fin

(Translated by Google)
If you arrive in the early hours, the bathrooms are closed, you'll wet yourself. You expect the shop to open at 7 am and the employee arrives at 7:15 am, still half asleep. A plain coffee with milk costs 1280 pesos… anyway
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMjZqRzJ3RRAB
